Off Calendar Jun-28-2017 Continued To Nov-01-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Knitter appeared by telephone for Forrest Blau.
Brady Dewar for Diane Root (Trustee).
Catherine Koss for Agnes Perez (Respondent).

Mr. Dewar stated that the Trustee is neutral and empowered to perform administration of the Trust. Ms. Koss and Mr. Knitter indicated that they will be conducting discovery and that they are interested in participating in mediation. The Petition to Confirm Invalidity of Donative Transfer to Caregiver, etc. is continued to November 1, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of discovery and status of mediation.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
